philosophy: Books teach principles, examples provide ground truth, datasets supply current parameters. LLM agents learn from books; deterministic engines validate against examples; all agents consume datasets at runtime.

phases.name: Foundation — Data Layer
phases.goal: Make all 244 Damodaran datasets programmatically accessible
outputs: Damodaran Excel loader (parse all .xls/.xlsx into normalized DataFrames)
Industry name registry (canonical list of Damodaran industries)
Region-aware data accessor (query by industry + region)
phases.validation: Every dataset loads without error; row counts match source files

phases.name: Foundation — Financial Data Ingestion
phases.goal: Fetch and normalize company financials from APIs and manual input
phases.learn_from: examples (to understand what fields are needed)
outputs: Yahoo Finance client (income statement, balance sheet, cash flow, key stats)
Manual input schema (what to ask for if API fails)
Financial normalizer (standardize field names, handle missing data)
phases.validation: Fetch financials for 5 example companies; all required DCF fields present

phases.name: Core Engine — DCF
phases.goal: Deterministic FCFF and FCFE models that reproduce Damodaran's example outputs
outputs: FCFF model (revenue → EBIT → NOPAT → FCFF → enterprise value)
FCFE model (net income → FCFE → equity value)
Terminal value (perpetuity growth + exit multiple)
Sensitivity table generator
phases.validation: Reproduce Amazon 2018, 3M, Amgen, Tata Steel valuations within 10%

phases.name: Risk & Cost of Capital
phases.goal: Compute WACC from Damodaran building blocks
phases.learn_from: datasets (betas, ERP, country risk, ratings, tax rates)
outputs: Beta estimator (company beta or industry unlevered beta re-levered)
Equity risk premium calculator (base ERP + country risk premium)
Cost of debt estimator (synthetic rating from interest coverage)
WACC assembler
phases.validation: WACC outputs match Damodaran wacc.xls for 10+ industries

phases.name: Relative Valuation Engine
phases.goal: Compare company multiples to Damodaran industry benchmarks
outputs: Multiple calculator (compute company PE, EV/EBITDA, PBV, PS)
Industry comparator (rank vs. Damodaran industry average/median)
Implied value from multiples
phases.validation: Correct industry match and multiple comparison for 5 companies

phases.name: Company Classifier
phases.goal: Auto-classify company type to route to correct model
phases.learn_from: books (Dark Side of Valuation — ch. 1-3 on company lifecycle)
outputs: Classification taxonomy: {mature, growth, young, distressed, cyclical, financial}
Rule-based pre-classifier (SIC code, negative earnings, bank/insurance sector)
LLM refinement prompt for ambiguous cases

phases.name: Excess Returns Engine (Financials)
phases.goal: Value banks and financial firms using equity excess return model
outputs: Excess return model (ROE - COE × book value, with growth)
Regulatory capital adjustments
phases.validation: Reproduce Goldman Sachs, Wells Fargo 2008, Deutsche Bank within 15%

phases.name: Growth Estimator
phases.goal: Propose growth assumptions from fundamentals + narrative
phases.learn_from: datasets (historical growth, ROE, fundamental growth) + books
outputs: Historical growth analyzer
Fundamental growth calculator (retention × ROE, reinvestment × ROIC)
LLM narrative growth prompt (industry trends, competitive position)
Growth assumption reconciler
phases.validation: Growth assumptions within reasonable range for all example companies

phases.name: Cross-Validator & Confidence Scoring
phases.goal: Reconcile multiple model outputs and score confidence
outputs: Model divergence calculator
Confidence scorer (data quality + model agreement + sensitivity)
Divergence explainer (LLM prompt)
phases.validation: Confidence score correlates with actual estimation error on examples

phases.name: Report Generator & Orchestrator
outputs: Report template (markdown)
Orchestrator prompts for Claude Code
Assumption override handler
CLAUDE.md with valuation workflow instructions
phases.validation: End-to-end valuation of 3 companies produces professional-quality reports

chapters_for_v1.topic: DCF mechanics — FCFF, FCFE, terminal value
Relative valuation — multiples selection and comparison
Estimating inputs — risk, growth, cash flows
Applying DCF in practice — stable, growth, emerging

damodaran_on_valuation.encoding_method: Extract decision rules and formulas into config/prompts/ as system prompt context

dark_side_of_valuation.encoding_method: Extract classification heuristics into classifier rules; extract adjustment methods into engine configs
